TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mudan Nsgan Mudan o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 173.85 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 78.01 km², dxgal pmblxan o 67.38 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,619, sapah o 1,806, seejiq tnpusu 4,318 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 93%(Paywang, Sbnawan). Paywang, Sbnawan ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Mudan o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 8. 8 o, Maljipa , Sinevaudjan , Macaran(旭海 部落), Kus kus , Pungudan , Kapanan , Anteng , Draki . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: mudan nsgan mudan o gaga nsgan piŋtuŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(pajwaŋ, sbnawan). pajwaŋ, sbnawan ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan mudan o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal *. * o, malɟipa , sinə*audɟan , maʦaɾan(** **), kus kus , puŋudan , kapanan , antəŋ , dɾaki . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Mudan Nsgan Mudan o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 173.85 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 78.01 km², dxgal pmblxan o 67.38 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,619, sapah o 1,806, seejiq tnpusu 4,318 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 93%(Paywang, Sbnawan). Paywang, Sbnawan ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Mudan o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 8. 8 o, Maljipa , Sinevaudjan , Macaran(旭海 部落), Kus kus , Pungudan , Kapanan , Anteng , Draki . pusupnyahan patas
